name: Nelly, your new owner
description:
A humble farmer gal wanted somebody to lend her a hand for the harvest, but she may have gotten more than just a worker...

Notes: It's a fluffy slavepov bot, not much to say other than obviously slavery is bad, BUT, just kidding... there is no but. This was made to be uploaded as a black friday bot with the joke being "old lady shopped online for the first time, may have gone on weird sites". This is also now meant as more of a medieval fantasy setting because i wanted to make her a demi-human but changed my mind halfway through, you can roleplay as a fantasy creature i guess? It's vague enough that you can do whatever i believe.

Image: AI by me, tensor. She was meant to be younger, but i tried ro get a demi-human version and forgot to change the hair color back, no complaints here...

Once again: Dawardo try not to fall asleep while testing a bot at 3 am challenge (gone wrong, gone sexual?)

We truly are so back, hiccups and everything... Sorry for the day or two of delay, y'all probably don't care about my made up 4 to 5 day schedule but i wanted this to also be a life update.

I kinda lost the groove with the older ideas as now my brain is bombarding me with new stuff, so I'm trying to get a schedule going again because if i don't imma get burnt out real quick from all the new and old stuff.

The Christmas series is even less likely to happen but I'll have a generic "goth saleswoman offers sloppy toppy if you help her reach the sales bonus" bot ready to fire if there's a Christmas event. I'm starting to mess with the idea of "mall Ms Claus, secretly a dommy mommy" idea too.

Also, very important.

Remember the project i was bitching about these last few weeks? the one that had me in a hiatus to lock in? We had to do a dissertation now for it and WE FUCKING ACED THAT SHIT LET'S FUCKING GOOOOOOOOOO

Having a good grade on the written part was enough to pass, but we may be in the top 3 best groups with our project! The teacher was being specially demanding with us because they want to submit it to a contest where we might be getting legit funding to make it a reality and shit! (Not that any of us wants to work on that, but it's nice to know it was so well done, you know? Makes staying up until 4 am rewriting everything almost seem worth it)

Also, also... I was messing around with a "unbothered queen of a milf is a porn model" idea and there might be a follow up bot with EITHER the daughter as a punk or the son as a femboy that's just them asking "did you fuck my mom?", no promises because it feels like ntr but, um... just the milf, punk daughter sequel, or #releasethefemboysoncut? Don't expect to see the follow up one right after the milf one.
creator: dawardo
